headline: Celtics crush Philly while Bruins collapse and Red Sox find new life
morning_brew: The C's are one win away from moving on after a 128-96 clinic in Philly. Jayson Tatum was doing it all with thirty points and eleven assists, but the real story was Payton Pritchard. The kid was unconscious from deep, hitting six threes on his way to thirty-two points. Spoiling Joel Embiid's return like that is exactly what this team needed to do. We are sitting on eighteen banners and this group looks ready to chase number nineteen.

Losing 6-1 to the Sabres in a playoff game is absolutely brutal. Jeremy Swayman got hung out to dry and the bench could not even look him in the eye when he got pulled. Marco Sturm is right to call it embarrassing because that effort was non-existent. One more loss and the season is over, which would be a pathetic way to follow up forty-five wins. The energy at the Garden was sucked out early and they never recovered.

Boston picked up a 5-3 win over the Orioles to start the post-Cora era. Willson Contreras stayed hot with his sixth homer of the year and the bullpen actually held a lead for the starter, Early. It was a solid response after a chaotic weekend in the front office. One win does not fix a 11-17 start, but at least they showed some life on the field. We'll see if they can keep it rolling tonight at the Rogers Centre.

The draft is in the books and now the rumor mill is spinning about a trade for A.J. Brown. Reflecting on the weekend, the front office focused on protection and defense with picks like Caleb Lomu and Gabe Jacas, but adding a true number one receiver would change everything for Drake Maye. Eight wins last season was an improvement, but this city expects a return to those dynasty years. If they can pull off a move for a star receiver, the rebuild gets a massive boost.

news_digest.headline: Celtics spoil Embiid's return, take 3-1 series lead
news_digest.dans_take: Putting the 76ers on the brink of elimination in their own building is a beautiful thing.

news_digest.headline: Bruins on the brink of elimination after blowout loss to Sabres
news_digest.dans_take: Sturm called it embarrassing and he is being kind because that was a total no-show.

news_digest.headline: What could the Patriots trade for receiver A.J. Brown?
news_digest.dans_take: If this trade actually happens, it would be the biggest move this team has made in years.
